title: Create and Explore
description: Fabric based modpack focused around the Create Mod, building and exploration
body:
![Minecraft: Create And Explore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee523451af2e83047ca30d9ea2eaf52f82738722.png)
# Create And Explore
Create and Explore is a fabric based modpack focused around transportation and exploration. This modpack allows you to utilise your full creativity, by addings mods such as Create, Chipped, Adorn and Macaw's Furniture, as well as slowing down your progression through the mod LevelZ

PS: If you are experiencing any strange issues, please post them in the "cne-issues" channel on my Discord Server so that I can look into it! :)
## The main mods
- Create
- Create Deco
- Create Enchantment Industry
- Create: Steam 'n' Rails
- Create: New Age
- Create: Power Loader
- Create: Copycats +
- Farmers Delight
- Create Slice & Dice
- Extended Drawers
- Chipped
- Niftycarts
- Immersive Weathering
- Armor Statutes
- Better Archeology
- Botany Pots
- EMI
- LevelZ
- Adorn
- Macaw's Furniture
- A few performance mods
# 
*All mods are the property of their respective owners
